message: Hey Alex... dont forget to pick up trash bags next week when you go shopping...
already did, dad 😂
oh... i must have misremembered... did u get the ones with the EXTRA STRONG SEAL?
yeah, dad ,i got those ones 🙄
good... glad u took care of it... btw ,hows the lawn looking?... need to mow it soon...
next wednesday at 9 AM? can u pick u up from the hospital for ur physical?
yeah, dad, i'll pick you up next wednesday at 9 am from the hospital. see you then 💀
dont 4get 2 fill up ur gas tank btw...
dad, i'll fill up my gas tank, don't worry 😂
also, dont 4get 2 check ur oil levels... and maybe take a look at the tire pressure...
dude, stop worrying about the car, i'll check everything, okay? 💕
ok ok... but u still need 2 mow ur lawn before i come over next wednesday...
and dont 4get 2 water the plants too...
dad, can we please focus on next wednesday? i have a physical at the hospital and i need you to pick me up at 9 am. thanks!
ok... i'll make sure 2 be there at 9 am next wednesday... dont 4get 2 set ur alarm clock... and by the way, u should mow ur lawn before i come over...
dude, seriously, can we please just focus on next wednesday? i need you to pick me up at 9 am, and that's it, okay? 🙄
ok... i'll be there at 9 am next wednesday... dont worry about the lawn...
thanks, dad. see you next wednesday at 9 am. try to forget about the lawn for now 😂
by the way, dont 4get 2 check ur oil level before i pick u up next wednesday...
dad, come on, check the oil level? it's a hospital, not a road trip... just pick me up at 9 am and we're good, okay? 😂
ok... fine... i'll just drop u off at the hospital and go home... but u really should check ur oil level... it's good maintenance...
dude, seriously, just stop worrying about the car's oil level, it's fine... just focus on picking me up at 9 am next wednesday, okay? 😂
i just cant help it... u should really check ur oil level... what if the car breaks down on the way to the hospital...
dude, i swear, it's not going to break down, just pick me up at 9 am and let's go, okay? 😂
ok... i'll pick u up at 9 am... but u still need 2 check ur oil level... i just dont want u 2 get stuck somewhere...
thank you, dad, i'll see you next wednesday at 9 am, just stop worrying about the car's oil level, okay? 😂
i'll also mow the lawn before u come so it looks nice...
dude, the lawn is fine, don't feel like you need to mow it just for me, thanks tho 😂
i just cant help it... i want to make sure the car is in good condition... can u please bring ur car to the house so i can take a look...
dude, no, i'm not bringing the car to the house, just meet me at the hospital at 9 am, okay? 😂
ok... i'll just meet u at the hospital then... but can u pls check the air pressure in ur tires before wednesday... dont wanna get stuck in traffic
ok... i'll stop bugging u about the car now... just make sure u get a good breakfast before ur appointment... Love, Dad
hey dad, can we pelase talk about the medication i'm running low on, can you remind me to refill the prescription this week?
oh yeah... the medication... dont worry i got it... i'll write it down on the fridge so u dont forget... LOVE, DAD
dude, please just check the fridge yourself and make sure it's on the list for the pharmacy, okay? i don't want to have to call and ask you to remind me 😂
ok... i'll check the fridge now... but i just spilled coffee on the keyboard so give me a minute... LOVE, DAD
just take a sec to clean the keyboard, okay? i'll call you in 10 to confirm the pharmacy pickup
haha, still waiting for that keyboard update... coffee stain or not, i need that reminder to work
oh no alex... sorry to hear that... dont worry ill try to call a tow truck... but my phone is being weird... cant seem to find the number...
ok i think i found the number... um let me try... *taps on phone*... AAA is 1-800-AAA-HELP... i hope that works...
yeah thanks dad but i already had the number saved. can you just call for me instead?
oh no Alex... dont worry... i think i accidentally deleted the tow truck app... can you try to call themf or me...
dude, how can you delete an app? just redownload it or use a search to find the number. i'm stuck on the side of the road here...
ok ok... i think i need help with this phone... can you send me the number and i'll call it for you...
dude, it's 2023, you can just search for the number online... or better yet, just ask a voice assistant to call them for you 🙄
ok... i think i need to get the assistant to work... umm... how do i say... hey siri call tow truck number...
dad, it's 'hey siri, call [tow truck company name]'... just say the name of the company, not the number... and also, how do you not know this? 😂
ok alex... i think i got it... i said hey siri call tow truck company... now what do i do next...?
just wait for siri to make the call, it should connect you to the tow truck company, and then just tell them where you are and what's wrong with your car
siri just hung up... now what...? do i need to do something else...?
dude, siri just hung up? that's weird, try saying 'hey siri, call tow truck company again' and see if it works this time
ok... i said hey siri call tow truck company again... and now i get a recording saying i need to dial the number myself... what do i do now...??
okay, just dial the number manually and ask for assistance, they'll send someone to help you
ok... i think i finally got the number... it's 555-1234... i'll try calling now... fingers crossed...
how's it going with the call, did you get someone on the line yet? 😂
oh thank goodness... i finally got a person on the line... they said someone will be there within 30 minutes... now i just have to wait... i hope your car is going to be okay...
yeah, fingers crossed it's just a simple fix, will update oyu when i know more
make sure to give them the exact location... i was thinking... maybe you could pull over to the gas station across the street... they have a big sign... easier for them to find you
dude, seriously, just follow the map on your phone, it'll give you turn by turn directions to the hospital, no need to pull over at the gas station
oh... right... the map thing... i guess i should just use the GPS... will try to navigate... love, dad
just so we're clear, i'd appreciate it if you could just follow the doctor's instructions and come with me to the hospital, no need to worry about my car at the moment
i'll be there soon... don't worry about the car... what's going on with the test results?
the doctor wants to talk to me about the results, just get here when you can, i'll fill you in then
oh... ok... i'll just head out... did you cut the lawn this weekend...
dad, seriously, can we focus on the hospital right now? i'll tell you about the lawn later, i promise 😂
okay... sorry... just want to make sure the lawn is okay... it's been a while since i mowed it...
dad, the lawn can wait, seriously, please just focus on getting to the hospital, i'll explain everything when you get here, okay?
just get here as soon as you can, i'll be waiting in the waiting room
ok... sorry again... i'll head out now... did you check the oil in the car... it's been a while since it was changed...
dad, seriously, the car is fine, stop worrying about it, just get to the hospital!
i'll check the oil on my way, just in case, don't worry about the car, LOVE, DAD
